column1: Both schemas at a glance. PMBOK on the left, Document Management on the right.

column4: Forms the spine of cross-system traceability. Assigned at triage in DM, propagates into every PMBOK row.
Identifies the controlled document in DM. PMBOK references it for any artifact that becomes a controlled doc.
Person directory lives in DM and is referenced from PMBOK rows.
Department lookup lives in DM; PMBOK uses an enum mirror of department codes.
Compliance frame catalog lives in DM.
